name: California Loan Co. Inc
description_short: California Loan Co. Inc offers payday loans in San Jose with loan amounts from $100–$2,500 and same-day or next-day funding through a simple online application process.
description_long:
California Loan Co. Inc is a payday lender headquartered in San Jose, California at 530 W San Carlos St. The company operates as a storefront lender with physical office hours and phone support, positioning itself as an accessible emergency cash solution for consumers in the San Jose area. The business maintains a 3.8-star rating on review platforms based on 5 customer reviews.

The company specializes in small, fast payday loans ranging from $100 to $2,500. Their primary offering is designed for emergency cash needs with advertised same-day or next-day funding. They market a simple online form for loan applications and emphasize speed of access to funds as their core value proposition. The company also lists alternative lending options and competitors in their service area, including credit unions, banks, and other payday lenders.

California Loan Co. Inc distinguishes itself through local San Jose presence with extended weekend hours (Saturday 11AM–6PM) and consistent weekday availability (10AM–6PM Monday–Friday). They claim 24/7 customer accessibility via email support and promise 1-2 business day response times. The company asserts data security and safety of personal information on their application form.

As a payday lender, California Loan Co. Inc operates in a sector known for high interest rates and short repayment cycles. While the website does not disclose APR or fee structures, payday loans typically carry annual percentage rates of 300% or higher. The company's business model depends on short-term, high-cost lending rather than credit-building or financial improvement. Consumers should carefully evaluate whether a payday loan is necessary before applying, as these products often trap borrowers in cycles of repeated borrowing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Small loan amounts ($100–$2,500) accessible to consumers with limited credit
Advertised same-day or next-day funding for emergency cash needs
Simple online application process described as quick and straightforward
Local San Jose storefront with extended weekend hours (Saturday availability)
24/7 customer support contact via email with promised 1-2 business day response
Claims data security and safe handling of personal information
No minimum loan amount—can borrow as little as $100
cons: Website does not disclose APR, fees, or interest rates—typical payday loans carry 300%+ APR
Short repayment cycles characteristic of payday loans create debt trap potential
Physical location limits convenience for customers outside San Jose area
Only 5 customer reviews available; limited transparency on customer satisfaction history
No alternative products offered—no credit-building, personal loans, or lower-cost options
best_for: Consumers in the San Jose area facing immediate cash emergencies with no other options
Individuals with poor credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Workers needing short-term cash advances until next paycheck (if used responsibly as one-time solution)
diagnosis: California Loan Co. Inc is best for San Jose-area consumers facing genuine emergencies who have exhausted other options and understand payday loan costs. The critical caveat is that payday loans are expensive, short-term debt products—APR and fees are not disclosed on the website, but industry-standard rates exceed 300% annually, making this suitable only for true one-time emergencies, not recurring financial needs.
services: In-person loan processing at San Jose storefront
Loan amount selection tool (pre-populated amounts from $100–$2,500)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 530 W San Carlos St, San Jose, CA 95126
